zh.lifeSummary: 當John Whalesborough於大約1369年出生在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛時，他的父親Sir John Whalesborough24歲，母親Margaret Pilkington25歲。他於1395年與Joan Raleigh在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年1月10日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Whalesborough于大约1369年出生在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛时，他的父亲Sir John Whalesborough24岁，母亲Margaret Pilkington25岁。他于1395年与Joan Raleigh在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年1月10日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Whalesborough was born about 1369, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Whalesborough, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Pilkington, was 25. He married Joan Raleigh in 1395, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 10 January 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Whalesborough est né environ 1369, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Whalesborough, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pilkington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Raleigh en 1395, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Whalesborough um 1369 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Whalesborough 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Pilkington 25. Er hat 1395 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England Joan Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1418 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Whalesborough è nato il circa 1369 nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Whalesborough, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Pilkington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Raleigh nel 1395, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Whalesboroughが約1369年にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウで生まれた時，父Sir John Whalesboroughは24歳，母Margaret Pilkingtonは25歳であった。1395年にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウでJoan Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年1月10日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Whalesborough(이)가 대략 1369년 영국 코른월 화알스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Whalesborough(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Pilkington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 코른월 화알스버루에서 Joan Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 1월 10일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Whalesborough nasceu aproximadamente 1369, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Whalesborough, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pilkington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Raleigh em 1395, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Whalesborough родился около 1369 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Whalesborough было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pilkington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Raleigh в 1395 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 10 января 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Whalesborough nació aproximadamente 1369, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Whalesborough, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Pilkington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Raleigh en 1395, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
